title: Senior Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Eve, an AI legal-tech leader, seeks a RevOps leader with 8–10+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Operations at high-growth B2B SaaS and 3–5 years of people leadership. The role focuses on diagnosing revenue leaks—stalled pipeline, low conversion, slow follow-up, broken handoffs—and leading cross-functional fixes end-to-end. You'll build and lead a high-performing team across process design, project management, and GTM analytics, operating as a peer to senior leaders in Sales, CS, Marketing, and Finance. An AI-native operating posture and bias toward decisive action are expected.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with proven people leadership, pipeline diagnostics expertise, and cross-functional GTM operations experience directly align with Eve's needs. Remote US role matches his location preferences, and AI-native legal-tech represents an exciting adjacent vertical where his core RevOps competencies translate seamlessly.
ai_opener: Eve's focus on diagnosing revenue leaks and building data-driven GTM operations caught my attention—it's exactly the work I've spent 15 years perfecting across scaling SaaS companies. I've led similar transformations identifying stalled pipeline patterns and broken handoffs, then built teams to operationalize fixes end-to-end. I'm curious how you're thinking about AI-native tools to accelerate revenue diagnostics in legal-tech.

title: Head of RevOps
description: Candid Health seeks an experienced Head of RevOps to build and lead its Sales Operations function. This is a pivotal role shaping how GTM teams execute—from compensation design to forecasting, reporting, systems, and strategic planning. You'll be both a hands-on operator and strategic leader, partnering with Sales, Marketing, Product, Finance, and Legal to ensure scalable growth. Responsibilities include leading day-to-day sales operations (quota management, commissions, forecasting, planning), building annual operating plans, preparing board and executive-level reporting, and driving change management across GTM functions.
score_reason: Exceptional match for a senior RevOps leader—Head of RevOps role is core to Omri's target positions, building sales operations functions and GTM scaling align perfectly with his 15+ years B2B SaaS expertise, and remote US placement works globally.
ai_opener: Omri here—saw Candid Health is building out its RevOps function as a strategic lever for GTM execution. With 15+ years scaling revenue operations across B2B SaaS, I've spent my career doing exactly what you're describing: designing comp structures that drive behavior, building forecasting models that actually predict, and orchestrating the systems and people that make Sales and Marketing execution repeatable. Would be worth a quick conversation about how you're thinking about the function's evolution.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation strategies, plus strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool). You'll redesign territory models for global scalability, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition, and maintain accurate territory mapping in CRM systems (Salesforce, Fullcast). Proficiency with Salesforce and territory management tools (Fullcast, Pigment, Anaplan) and strong cross-functional collaboration are essential.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's senior RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and operations directly leverage core competencies, though this is more specialized/tactical than his typical Head of Revenue Operations scope.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across the RevOps Manager role at Gong focusing on territory strategy and operations. Given your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS and deep Salesforce expertise, your experience optimizing pipeline forecasting and sales operations could directly impact how Gong scales territories globally. I'd love to explore if this resonates.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to build, own, and scale the operational backbone for its New Verticals division. Reporting to the Head of Revenue Operations, you'll be the first dedicated RevOps hire for New Verticals, responsible for systems, processes, and data infrastructure. This is a build role: architecting the GTM engine from the ground up—Salesforce configuration, pipeline management, routing, reporting, and the revenue tech stack. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations, deep Salesforce expertise, and a builder mentality. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot is valued.
score_reason: Exceptional match—senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience perfectly aligned with building GTM infrastructure from scratch. Deep Salesforce expertise, pipeline forecasting, and tech stack architecture directly address the core build mandate for New Verticals.
ai_opener: I've spent 15 years architecting revenue operations at scale across B2B SaaS—from Salesforce configuration and pipeline management to building entire GTM engines from the ground up. Flex's New Verticals division needs exactly that: someone to own the operational backbone end-to-end. I'm looking to build the next revenue system that actually scales.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Customer Operations
description: Later seeks a Revenue Operations Manager for Customer Operations. Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations, or Customer Operations within SaaS, professional services, or solutions delivery. You'll build a unified customer health measurement framework, design cross-functional processes, and act as a trusted operational partner to Services, Client Success, Sales, and Finance leaders. Success includes a documented Sales-to-Services handoff process, trusted campaign efficiency reporting, and a pipeline-to-capacity forecasting model. Strong Salesforce command, capacity planning/forecasting experience, and analytical insight are required.
score_reason: Strong match on core RevOps competencies (Salesforce, forecasting, pipeline management, cross-functional process design) and seniority level. Good fit for the Customer Operations angle given B2B SaaS background, though the Services/Solutions delivery focus is slightly outside primary wheelhouse compared to pure GTM/Growth roles.
ai_opener: Hi there—I noticed Later is building out a unified customer health framework and Sales-to-Services handoff processes. With 15+ years scaling revenue operations across B2B SaaS, I've built similar cross-functional models that tied pipeline forecasting to capacity planning and improved handoff efficiency. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience with Salesforce architecture and operational scaling could accelerate your customer operations maturity.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed grant-management SaaS with 5,000+ nonprofit clients, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This is a builder role: architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at B2B SaaS, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), and CRM admin experience (HubSpot strongly preferred). Familiarity with enrichment vendors (Clearbit, ZoomInfo, Apollo) and intent data providers (Bombora, G2, 6sense) is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and GTM systems expertise directly aligns with Instrumentl's need for a builder-focused RevOps Manager. His strong technical foundation (CRM architecture, data modeling, integrations) and experience with enrichment/intent tools make him an ideal fit for scaling their revenue infrastructure.

With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue engines and deep hands-on experience building complex Salesforce/HubSpot ecosystems with enrichment and intent data integration, I'm confident I can own the technical infrastructure powering your next growth phase.

title: Sales Strategy & Operations Manager
description: Eve, a legal-tech leader empowering plaintiff attorneys with AI-driven solutions, seeks an early RevOps hire to ensure the sales team operates at peak efficiency. You'll own systems, processes, and insights that help AEs move faster and stay compliant with the GTM process, partnering with Sales, Finance, and Marketing. Requires 4–7 years in Sales Operations, Revenue Operations, or Enablement at a SaaS company, deep understanding of B2B sales motions, and HubSpot (preferred) or Salesforce admin fluency. Comfort with Outreach, Gong, ZoomInfo, and a hands-on, low-ego approach are valued.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps fit with HubSpot/Salesforce expertise and B2B SaaS background, but the 4–7 year requirement significantly undervalues Omri's 15+ year seniority level—this role may feel like a step backward despite being early-stage RevOps. Legal-tech/AI-native GTM aligns well, though the early-stage nature and potential compensation/scope mismatch are concerns.
ai_opener: Hi Eve team—I noticed you're building out RevOps as a core growth lever in legal-tech, where compliance and sales velocity directly impact unit economics. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM stacks and deep HubSpot/Salesforce fluency, I've architected exactly these systems (Outreach, Gong, forecasting) at similar growth stages. I'm curious whether you're open to a more seasoned operator who can accelerate your go-to-market maturity.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Nooks, an AI Sales Assistant Platform backed by $70M from top VCs including Kleiner Perkins, seeks its first GTM Engineer to serve as the technical co-pilot for its Sales Development organization—owning setup, optimization, and enablement within the Nooks platform. Responsibilities include connecting GTM technologies and resolving process bottlenecks, data issues, and inconsistencies. Requires 2+ years of relevant sales development experience selling into sales leaders, prospecting into B2B SaaS mid-market/enterprise companies, strong analytic skills, and deep familiarity with systems like Nooks, HubSpot, ZoomInfo, and Sales Navigator.
score_reason: Strong alignment on RevOps/GTM technical expertise, AI-native platform experience, and HubSpot/systems integration skills. However, the role's emphasis on sales development selling experience and prospecting into B2B SaaS is atypical for a senior RevOps executive—Omri is overqualified for the SDR-facing aspects but may find the scope narrower than his strategic GTM focus.
ai_opener: Nooks' approach to AI-native sales enablement resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps infrastructure that scales GTM operations, and the GTM Engineer role perfectly bridges your platform's technical setup with real operational leverage. Given your VC backing and rapid growth trajectory, I'd be excited to discuss how I can architect Nooks' integration ecosystem and eliminate the data/process friction your SDR org faces.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research used by brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations. Scaling 20x in revenue, Conveo needs someone to replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows. Think lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines that work, faster customer onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly. A strong coding background and GTM mindset are essential.
score_reason: Strong GTM mindset and RevOps automation expertise align well with the role's need to replace manual workflows and build internal tools. However, the emphasis on coding ability and building purpose-built applications is a notable gap for a RevOps executive whose strength lies in process optimization and tool orchestration rather than software engineering.
ai_opener: Conveo's 20x revenue scaling creates exactly the kind of RevOps chaos I've solved at scale—fragmented tools, manual workflows, broken attribution. I've built lead scoring systems, automated pipeline management, and customer onboarding flows that eliminated hundreds of hours of manual work. While my strength is architecting these systems rather than coding them from scratch, I'd love to explore whether a RevOps engineer with deep GTM automation expertise could complement your engineering approach.

title: Senior Growth Product Manager
description: Superhuman seeks a Senior Growth Product Manager to drive sustainable, scalable growth across the customer lifecycle—acquisition, activation, retention, and expansion. You'll be at the forefront of the Product-Led Growth (PLG) strategy, leading high-impact experiments and building systems that accelerate customer value and revenue. Requires 3+ years in growth product management, ideally in B2B SaaS or a product-led environment, with a proven track record in PLG or self-serve models owning metrics like signup-to-activation, retention, expansion, and LTV/CAC. Strong experimentation and analytical skills are essential. Remote in the US or Canada.
score_reason: Strong alignment on B2B SaaS, LTV/CAC expertise, and growth metrics ownership, but this is a product management role rather than RevOps/GTM operations—a lateral move away from Omri's core executive function. Location is acceptable as remote US/Canada.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building GTM and RevOps infrastructure in B2B SaaS, and I've always admired how Superhuman obsesses over activation metrics and LTV expansion. While this Senior Growth PM role is slightly outside my RevOps wheelhouse, your focus on PLG systems and signup-to-activation optimization is exactly the kind of metrics-driven, experiment-led work I've architected from the ops side. Would love to explore if there's a way my GTM operations expertise could complement or accelerate your growth product roadmap.
